conflicts.title: About page founding year conflict
conflicts.description: Found multiple founding years in About content: 1981, 1991.
conflicts.suggestedAction: Confirm a single canonical founding year before importing page content.

conflicts.title: Malformed product field name
conflicts.description: 20 products use legacy field "benifits" instead of "benefits".
conflicts.suggestedAction: Validate normalized benefits arrays for all affected products before import.

conflicts.title: Missing footer source detail
conflicts.description: Footer content source was not included in the approved legacy input scope.
conflicts.suggestedAction: Provide footer source file or define footer options manually in WordPress.

conflicts.title: Duplicated contact form logic
conflicts.description: Contact form implementation exists in both HomePage and ContactUs legacy files.
conflicts.suggestedAction: Merge to a single canonical form model before import.

conflicts.title: Missing category archive hero images
conflicts.description: 4 categories require archive hero image mapping.
conflicts.suggestedAction: Assign archive hero media before importing taxonomy content.

conflicts.title: Product CTA placeholders remain
conflicts.suggestedAction: Set product-level CTA label and URL values before publish.

conflicts.title: Application industry data incomplete
conflicts.description: 6 products are missing application industry mappings.
conflicts.suggestedAction: Populate missing application industries before import.

conflicts.title: Category structure mismatch
conflicts.description: 1 service category contain no products and rely on empty-state taxonomy rendering.
conflicts.suggestedAction: Review service-only category settings and confirm empty-state copy before import.
